content.cn_text: 在今天的讲座中，我们将探讨水下考古遗址在
content.en_text: In today's lecture, we'll be examining the role of underwater archaeological sites in

content.cn_text: 揭示可能已随时间流逝的古代文明细节方面的作用。
content.en_text: uncovering details about ancient civilizations that might otherwise have been lost to time.

content.cn_text: 这些遗址对于研究那些几乎没有留下正式记录的文化特别重要。
content.en_text: These sites are particularly significant for studying cultures that left little to no

content.cn_text: 正式记录的文化特别重要。
content.en_text: formal records.

content.cn_text: 一个很好的例子是新西兰的毛利人，他们的历史是通过
content.en_text: A good example is the Maurees of New Zealand, whose history was passed down

content.cn_text: 口头而非书面文件传承下来的。事实上，他们经常被认为是一个
content.en_text: orally rather than through written documents. In fact, they are frequently recognized as a society

content.cn_text: 缺乏任何形式的书面文字的社会。这使得实物发现变得更加重要。
content.en_text: that lacked any form of written script. This made physical discoveries all the more important.

content.cn_text: 令人着迷的是，我们能从人们的日常作息和社会行为中学到多少东西
content.en_text: What's fascinating is how much we can learn about people's daily routines and social behavior

content.cn_text: 从这些遗迹中。例如，船上物品的布置可以提供线索
content.en_text: from these remains. The arrangement of objects on board, for instance, can offer clues

content.cn_text: 关于几百年前那些航海者的生活方式。研究这些沉船的过程
content.en_text: about the lifestyle of those who sailed centuries ago. The process of studying these shipwrecks

content.cn_text: 由于设备的进步而发生了巨大变化。
content.en_text: has changed dramatically thanks to advancements in equipment.

content.cn_text: 研究人员现在严重依赖水下无人机、声纳扫描仪和成像软件。
content.en_text: Researchers now rely heavily on underwater drones, sonar scanners, and imaging software.

content.cn_text: 总的来说，这种现代技术使得挖掘更加精确，且侵入性大大降低。
content.en_text: Collectively, this modern technology has made excavation more precise and far less invasive.

content.cn_text: 现在，当我们谈论沉船原因时，很容易想到战争或海盗。
content.en_text: Now, when we talk about causes of shipwrecks, it's easy to imagine warfare or piracy.

content.cn_text: 但是，更多情况下，沉船是由于自然力量造成的。
content.en_text: But, more often than not, the wrecks occurred due to natural forces.

content.cn_text: 最常被提及的原因之一是遭遇一场猛烈的风暴，当时的船只
content.en_text: One of the most commonly cited causes is exposure to a violent storm, which ships at the time

content.cn_text: 没有能力很好地抵御。有趣的是，打捞出的材料有时
content.en_text: were not well equipped to withstand. Interestingly, the material recovered is sometimes

content.cn_text: 不仅仅用于学术研究。博物馆和电影制作人经常合作
content.en_text: used for more than just academic research. Museums and film producers often collaborate to

content.cn_text: 创作沉浸式展览。最近的一个案例中，文物被用于制作一个
content.en_text: create immersive exhibitions. In one recent case, artifacts were used in the making of a

content.cn_text: 历史电影画廊，以视觉方式讲述了17世纪商船上的生活。
content.en_text: historical film gallery that visually narrated life on board a 17th-century trading vessel.

content.cn_text: 尽管如此，研究人员在这些调查中经常面临障碍。在许多地方，
content.en_text: That said, researchers frequently face barriers in these investigations. In many locations,

content.cn_text: 脆弱的生态系统、不可预测的潮汐和有限的进入途径严重限制了
content.en_text: fragile ecosystems, unpredictable tides, and limited access have severely restricted the

content.cn_text: 现场可进行的研究量。一个特别引人注目的案例涉及一艘船
content.en_text: amount of research that can be conducted on site. One particularly compelling case involved a ship

content.cn_text: 似乎是为战斗而装备的。残骸中包括一个被认为是火炮的物品
content.en_text: that appeared to be equipped for combat. The wreckage included what was believed to be a gun

content.cn_text: 用于防御海盗袭击。这一罕见的发现为我们理解
content.en_text: used to defend against pirate raids. A rare find that adds a dramatic dimension to our understanding

content.cn_text: 海上风险增添了戏剧性的维度。同样引人入胜的是，发现了一张部分航海图
content.en_text: of maritime risks. Equally intriguing was the discovery of a navigational map still partially

content.cn_text: 完好的航海图，其中概述了船只在当时活跃的贸易路线中的预定航线。
content.en_text: intact, which outlined the ship's intended course through trade routes active at the time.

content.cn_text: 这些地图不仅揭示了目的地，还展示了那个时代的海事知识。
content.en_text: These maps not only reveal destinations, but also show the maritime knowledge of the era.

content.cn_text: 那么这些航行最初是为了什么呢？嗯，很大一部分是为了利润。
content.en_text: So why were these voyages made in the first place? Well, much of it came down to profit.

content.cn_text: 许多这些船只运载着珍贵材料，特别是黄金，
content.en_text: Many of these vessels were transporting precious materials, particularly gold,

content.cn_text: 在不断扩张的帝国中需求量很大。最后，沉船中发现
content.en_text: which was in high demand across expanding empires. And finally, it's not unusual for wrecks

content.cn_text: 个人和奢侈品并不少见。在一些案例中，考古学家发现了宝藏
content.en_text: to yield personal and luxury items. In several cases, archaeologists have uncovered treasure

content.cn_text: 藏品，其中包含精美珠宝和古董硬币，揭示了那个时代的财富和工艺水平
content.en_text: collections featuring fine jewelry and antique coins, shedding light on both wealth and craftsmanship

content.cn_text: 的水平。
content.en_text: of the period.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 31-40.

items.title: The Maoris are an example of a society that never developed a 31. ________ form of communication.
Discoveries at underwater sites have helped scholars better understand the everyday 32. ________ of ancient communities.
In recent excavations, experts have applied advanced 33. ________ to improve the accuracy of findings.
One commonly identified cause of many wrecks is damage caused by a violent 34. ________.
Some findings have been used to produce a 35. ________ gallery to showcase life on board sunken vessels.
Due to difficult access and preservation issues, the amount of 36. ________ conducted was quite restricted.
There was one wreck where the crew used a 37. ________ as a defense against pirate attacks.
Among the materials found was a 38. ________ that detailed the ship’s intended route.
Valuable cargo, especially items like 39. ________, was a major motivation for early explorers.
Various luxury goods were discovered, including jewellery and old 40. ________.

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
Underwater Archaeological Sites
General Information
• The Maoris are an example of a society that never developed a $31$ form of communication.
• Discoveries at underwater sites have helped scholars better understand the everyday $32$ of ancient communities.
Shipwrecks
• In recent excavations, experts have applied advanced $33$ to improve the accuracy of findings.
• One commonly identified cause of many wrecks is damage caused by a violent $34$.
Learn from it
• Some findings have been used to produce a $35$ gallery to showcase life on board sunken vessels.
• Due to difficult access and preservation issues, the amount of $36$ conducted was quite restricted.
Examples
• There was one wreck where the crew used a $37$ as a defense against pirate attacks.
• Among the materials found was a $38$ that detailed the ship’s intended route.
• Valuable cargo, especially items like $39$, was a major motivation for early explorers.
• Various luxury goods were discovered, including jewellery and old $40$.
